tables_info.after_context: Note. +SO ≠PAO; *YA ≠SO; ^YA ≠PAO, Bonferroni corrected, p < .05. No significant gender difference between the groups was found  \( \chi^{2}(2) = 4.01 \) , p = .14. M = mean; SD = standard deviation; PA = physical activity level (LTEQ no. of minutes of strenuous and moderate physical activity per week); Fitness = distance traveled on treadmill in 12 minutes (miles); BMI = body mass index; MMSE = Mini-Mental State Examination score; Fluency = semantic fluency performance.

Note. Cell values denote group means in milliseconds. Parentheses indicate standard deviation within cell. Analysis of variance contrast significance at p < .05 denoted by:  \( ^{*} \)  = Young vs. Sedentary.
iSP = ipsilateral silent period.
